Title: Monorepo + tooling (pnpm/turbo/TS/lint/format)
AcceptanceCriteria: pnpm install/build/lint/typecheck/test run green in CI

Title: CI pipeline (lint+typecheck+test+build+eval stub)
AcceptanceCriteria: CI runs on PR; required checks block merge

Title: Local dev env via docker-compose (pg+pgvector/redis/minio)
AcceptanceCriteria: `make up` brings up data plane; schema initialized

Title: Observability skeleton (OTel tracing + correlation id)
AcceptanceCriteria: one trace per request visible in collector

Title: Core schema + migrations (ERD)
AcceptanceCriteria: tables created; migration up/down; seed script

Title: Multi-tenancy via RLS + tenant context propagation
AcceptanceCriteria: cross-tenant read blocked by RLS test

Title: API gateway (authN/Z stub
AcceptanceCriteria: P0

Title: Supervisor run state machine + durable workflow spike
AcceptanceCriteria: run persists state; resumes after restart

Title: Planner L1 (template + DAG)
AcceptanceCriteria: tax_analysis template yields step graph

Title: Router L2 (capability + model tiering)
AcceptanceCriteria: selects agent+model+tools; emits routing record

Title: Executor L3 (retries/backoff/timeouts/circuit breaker)
AcceptanceCriteria: transient failures retried; breaker opens on repeated errors

Title: Model gateway + fallback chain (primary->secondary->degraded)
AcceptanceCriteria: primary outage falls through; every hop logged

Title: Critic L4 (grounding/citation/schema/confidence)
AcceptanceCriteria: low-confidence routes to approval gate

Title: Input guardrails (schema+PII/DLP+injection)
AcceptanceCriteria: PII redacted; injection sample blocked

Title: Output guardrails + citation enforcement
AcceptanceCriteria: uncited figure blocked/flagged

Title: Human-in-the-loop approval gate (+resume)
AcceptanceCriteria: consequential action waits for approve/reject

Title: Immutable hash-chained audit log + receipts
AcceptanceCriteria: every action writes tamper-evident event

Title: Budget envelope + token accounting + caps
AcceptanceCriteria: run over budget paused; cost attributed

Title: Prompt + semantic cache
AcceptanceCriteria: repeat request served from cache

Title: Eval harness + first golden set (US tax)
AcceptanceCriteria: CI eval job gates on regression

Title: Secrets mgmt + dependency/secret scanning in CI
AcceptanceCriteria: no secrets in repo; scans pass

Title: Document upload + OCR/parse + confidence
AcceptanceCriteria: 1040 parsed with page refs + confidence

Title: Chunk+embed into pgvector + retrieval/rerank
AcceptanceCriteria: grounded answer cites source page

Title: Deterministic tax calculators (brackets/thresholds)
AcceptanceCriteria: figures match fixtures; used by agent not LLM

Title: Tax-analysis agent (position + opportunities)
AcceptanceCriteria: returns cited opportunities w/ quantified impact

Title: Scenario modeling + side-by-side compare
AcceptanceCriteria: Roth scenario stays in-bracket; compares outcomes

Title: Client-ready letter + interactive report (post-approval)
AcceptanceCriteria: output generated only after approval; logged

Title: Design system package (tokens->components)
AcceptanceCriteria: Button/Card/KpiTile from tokens; no hardcoded colors

Title: Workspace shell + assistant + tax view (from prototype)
AcceptanceCriteria: matches prototype; calls orchestrator API

Title: Approval inbox + audit-log viewer
AcceptanceCriteria: approve/reject from UI; receipts visible
